news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia held EGM on Feb 13, 2026, to raise INR 1500 Cr via shares/warrants at INR 70 each.
The firm plans to increase authorized share capital to INR 900 Cr; Inspira Global to acquire controlling stake.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia held EGM on Feb 13, 2026, to raise INR 1500 Cr via shares/warrants at INR 70 each.
The firm plans to increase authorized share capital to INR 900 Cr; Inspira Global to acquire controlling stake.

news.title: Ajanta Pharma promoters plan to raise ₹2,000Cr for acquiring a controlling stake in Restaurants Brands Asia.
news.summary: Ajanta Pharma promoters plan to raise ₹2,000Cr for acquiring a controlling stake in Restaurants Brands Asia.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd updates EGM details for Feb 13, 2026, addressing share issuance and control transfer.
Acquirers to hold 26.7% post-issue, gain promoter status, and board nomination rights via article amendment.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd updates EGM details for Feb 13, 2026, addressing share issuance and control transfer.
Acquirers to hold 26.7% post-issue, gain promoter status, and board nomination rights via article amendment.

news.title:
Acquirers plan to purchase 26% shares of Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Offer worth ₹14,564 crore opens Mar 17-Apr 2, 2026, pending regulatory nod.
news.summary:
Acquirers plan to purchase 26% shares of Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Offer worth ₹14,564 crore opens Mar 17-Apr 2, 2026, pending regulatory nod.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 16.5% YoY, driven by store additions and same-store sales growth.
Inspira Global plans to acquire a controlling stake in RBA with Rs. 460 crore share purchase and Rs. 1,500 crore infusion.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue growth of 16.5% YoY, driven by store additions and same-store sales growth.
Inspira Global plans to acquire a controlling stake in RBA with Rs. 460 crore share purchase and Rs. 1,500 crore infusion.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia's Q3 net loss narrowed to 70M rupees from 186.3M rupees YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 5.8B rupees, compared to 4.95B rupees YoY.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia's Q3 net loss narrowed to 70M rupees from 186.3M rupees YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 5.8B rupees, compared to 4.95B rupees YoY.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia's open offer to acquire 20.8 cr shares at ₹70 each.
Total consideration is ₹14,564.3 cr; acquirers include Lenexis Foodworks, Aayush Agrawal Trust.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia's open offer to acquire 20.8 cr shares at ₹70 each.
Total consideration is ₹14,564.3 cr; acquirers include Lenexis Foodworks, Aayush Agrawal Trust.

news.title: Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd disclosed under SEBI (SAST) Regulation 29(1).
news.summary: Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd disclosed under SEBI (SAST) Regulation 29(1).

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd's board will meet on Feb 3, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed until Feb 6, 2026, post results declaration.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd's board will meet on Feb 3, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9-month FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed until Feb 6, 2026, post results declaration.

news.title:
Inspira Global to acquire controlling stake at ₹70/share, 10% premium.
The move, led by Aayush Agrawal, aims to boost long-term growth.
news.summary:
Inspira Global to acquire controlling stake at ₹70/share, 10% premium.
The move, led by Aayush Agrawal, aims to boost long-term growth.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia (RBA) to get new promoter as Inspira Global acquires control via ₹70/share preferential issue; Everstone exits fully.
Inspira Global to invest ₹1,500 crore via equity shares and warrants; mandatory open offer to follow. RBA shares closed at ₹63.45, down 5.1%.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia (RBA) to get new promoter as Inspira Global acquires control via ₹70/share preferential issue; Everstone exits fully.
Inspira Global to invest ₹1,500 crore via equity shares and warrants; mandatory open offer to follow. RBA shares closed at ₹63.45, down 5.1%.

news.title:
Acquirers plan to buy 20.8B shares of Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Transaction worth ₹14,564 crore will result in 61% voting capital post-deal.
news.summary:
Acquirers plan to buy 20.8B shares of Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Transaction worth ₹14,564 crore will result in 61% voting capital post-deal.

news.title:
Lenexis Foodworks and PAC launch open offer to acquire 26% of Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd at INR 70/share, totaling INR 1456.4 crores.
Motilal Oswal appointed as manager; transaction includes share purchase, subscription, and warrants issuance under SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Lenexis Foodworks and PAC launch open offer to acquire 26% of Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd at INR 70/share, totaling INR 1456.4 crores.
Motilal Oswal appointed as manager; transaction includes share purchase, subscription, and warrants issuance under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Inspira Global to acquire 11.3% stake in Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Inspira to infuse ₹1,500 crore; QSR Asia Pte. Ltd. exits fully post-approval.
news.summary:
Inspira Global to acquire 11.3% stake in Restaurant Brands Asia at ₹70/share.
Inspira to infuse ₹1,500 crore; QSR Asia Pte. Ltd. exits fully post-approval.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia to raise share capital from INR 700 Cr to 900 Cr.
12.85 Cr shares, 8.57 Cr warrants priced at INR 70 each; new promoters to take control.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia to raise share capital from INR 700 Cr to 900 Cr.
12.85 Cr shares, 8.57 Cr warrants priced at INR 70 each; new promoters to take control.

news.title:
PL Capital's Amnish Aggarwal highlights potential rebound in cement stocks like Dalmia Bharat, citing improved demand and pricing discipline post-Diwali.
Aggarwal sees limited downside for HDFC Bank with stabilizing NIMs, while Restaurants Brands Asia faces challenges in Indonesia but steady India operations.
news.summary:
PL Capital's Amnish Aggarwal highlights potential rebound in cement stocks like Dalmia Bharat, citing improved demand and pricing discipline post-Diwali.
Aggarwal sees limited downside for HDFC Bank with stabilizing NIMs, while Restaurants Brands Asia faces challenges in Indonesia but steady India operations.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd's board to meet on Jan 20, 2026, to consider fund-raising options.
Proposed methods include equity, warrants, or debt via private placement, rights issue, or QIP.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd's board to meet on Jan 20, 2026, to consider fund-raising options.
Proposed methods include equity, warrants, or debt via private placement, rights issue, or QIP.

news.title:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd received an order from ADM Kanpur for violating Sections 26(2)(ii) and 52 of the Food Safety Act.
The company is fined Rs. 1.5 lakh but states no material financial impact and reserves the right to challenge the order.
news.summary:
Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd received an order from ADM Kanpur for violating Sections 26(2)(ii) and 52 of the Food Safety Act.
The company is fined Rs. 1.5 lakh but states no material financial impact and reserves the right to challenge the order.

news.title: Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd received an order under the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006.
news.summary: Restaurant Brands Asia Ltd received an order under the Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006.

news.title: Restaurant Brands Asia's stock rose nearly 6% during trading.
news.summary: Restaurant Brands Asia's stock rose nearly 6% during trading.
